hero.title: Savings Goal Planner
hero.description: Track private fixed-currency savings targets, contributions, milestones, and transparent deadline pace.

flow.title: Plan → Record → Progress
steps: Create a target and starting balance

differences.title: Savings planning without financial overreach
differences.description: User-entered records remain transparent and private.

items.title: Define the target
items.description: Set category, currency, amount, priority, and optional date.

items.title: See what remains
items.description: Review deterministic weekly and monthly planning pace.

feel.title: Clear, calm, and accountable
feel.description: Simple records make long-term targets easier to revisit.

items.title: Bounded
items.description: No banking, transfers, investment predictions, or financial advice.

audiences.title: Who uses Savings Goal Planner
audiences.description: For people building a personal savings target.

items.title: Individuals
items.description: Track an emergency fund or planned purchase.

items.title: Families
items.description: Plan education, wedding, or family costs.

items.title: Travellers and makers
items.description: Save toward travel or a personal project.

items.title: Goals
items.description: Target, starting balance, deadline, priority, and state.

items.title: Milestones
items.description: Derived reached, pending, and missed stages.

items.name: Balance
items.description: Negative balances and overfunding are rejected.

items.name: Status
items.description: Full funding completes active goals automatically.

items.name: Filters
items.description: Combine status, category, priority, currency, timing, and dates.

technicalSection.title: Private and owner scoped
technicalSection.description: An isolated database and protected nested APIs keep each user’s plans separate.
items: Archived goals are read-only and inactive states are excluded from currency totals.
